name: Easy Cheesy Chicken with Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. Wrap tortillas in foil and place directly on the oven rack.
2. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet. Put flour and cutlets into a large plastic bag and shake to lightly coat chicken.
3. Add chicken to the skillet and cook (in batches if necessary), 1 to 2 minutes per side until golden. Remove to paper towels to drain. Wipe out skillet.
4. Add enchilada sauce and corn, and bring to a boil.
5. Drain and coarsely chop chilies.
6. Arrange cutlets on the sauce. Top with chilies and cheese. Cover, reduce heat and simmer 1 to 2 minutes until cheese melts. Slice scallions and sprinkle over top.
7. Remove tortillas from oven. To serve, place one cutlet and some sauce on each tortilla. Fold or roll up.
Makes 4 servings. Per serving: 560 calories, 40 grams protein, 64 grams carbohydrate, 16 grams fat, 88 milligrams cholesterol, 1585 milligrams sodium.
